title: Hurricane Milton (Pinellas baseline)
benchmark_focus: Baseline Florida hurricane denial benchmark with wind-vs-water, ACC, and investigation issues.
key_facts: Category 3 winds reached the west coast with broad Pinellas roof and envelope damage reports.
Interior water intrusion was reported within 48 hours after the claimed wind event.
The carrier position attributed the loss to pre-existing wear and excluded water damage.
notes: Default notebook benchmark because the committed cache fixtures already support the offline demo path.
Use this scenario as the baseline when comparing retrieval-quality changes against prior sessions.
